_comment: XMclaw skill marketplace catalog. Single source of truth for `xmclaw skill list-marketplace` and the web UI's 技能商店 page. The daemon fetches this file from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/1593959/XMclaw/main/docs/skill_marketplace_index.json (override with XMC_SKILL_MARKETPLACE_URL), caches it for 1h under ~/.xmclaw/cache/, and resolves `xmclaw skill install <id>` against the `source` field. Entries are curated by PR review — add a skill by appending to the `skills` array. Every install runs the security scanner against every *.py (fail-closed on CRITICAL findings) before registration.

_schema.version: int — index format version, bump on breaking schema changes
_schema.updated: str — ISO date of last edit (informational)
_schema.skills[].id: str — unique stable id, used by `skill install <id>`
_schema.skills[].name: str — display name
_schema.skills[].author: str
_schema.skills[].install_size_kb: int — approximate repo size for the install confirmation
